text:
Squarespace does NOT support server-side rewrites. The standard solution for integrating FlowBlinq on Squarespace is to use a Cloudflare Worker in front of your site. This allows you to proxy requests for files like /llms.txt and /api/serve/{slug}/schema.json.

You can find the necessary Cloudflare Worker code in the Setup tab of your audit. If you need further assistance, feel free to ask!
